item.title: Awww, she cried out of hapiness, she must have miss him soo much
item.dc:creator: VinewerLacewing

item.title: Images of Note: I'll have to hand you a lemon.
item.description:
Yeah
Correct, fuck the British Empire.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
nyoom
This is what all our memes will look like in 100 years.
owo
AAAAAAAAAAA
07/10/2025, 13:32:07 UTC.
They clearly had cocaine in coke back then too.
slay
If you are on Windows and type ctrl+win+alt+shift+L it takes you to fucking LinkedIn. They have a fucking shortcut for LinkedIn.
B O A T
Listen, The UK's politics is beyond irredeemable and I pray for Scottish Independence, but our plugs are the best designed out there. They're designed with Child Safety in mind and they allow us to wire them ourselves and install fuses. Can you say the same, America?
Judging by who's chasing who, I think that other cat didn't belong in that house.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I Stole This DUMP, So You Don't Have To. Tuesday Random Meme Dump Of Things That Make me Chuckle IRL
item.description:
1. These dudes are just amazing
2. Sound ON for this game
3. *Leather noises*
4. That is pretty amazing duel
5
6. Plot TWIST
7. True fact: this girl is used to power small cities
8. Just a velo baby
9. A-hole cat
10. My trying to navigate social occasions
11
12
13. F around and find out
14. Squire attack
15. Thanks for checking out the dump, finally I want to share something from the game I'm working on. It's a wacky Stanley Parable-inspired thing, that hopefully will resonate with people with weird humor. What do you think of this particular area of the game? Do you think the summations are funny or I should try and improved them. Oh, and if it's not to much hassle, please give the game a wishlist, it makes a world of difference to small dev teams like me and my brother: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: A small dump to celebrate IRL cake day. Just things that made me chuckle or 'aww', no other theme, most of them stolen from here over time.

item.title: Return of the meme: 1142 (space moonshine)
item.description:
It's morning. I am alive. Let us get our bread
Nikephoros Phokas did NOT like the landed aristocracy of the Eastern Roman Empire in the slightest.
One is maximum cozy, the other is bleh.
The dream. Remember that day I got the cheap liking everyone on Hinge thing? Only one person messaged me back. Out of about 100. And all we've talked about are snakes, and I don't know how to bring this conversation to a date, and honestly, I'm not sure I want to.
I really can't. Trying to motivate myself to get up and go up the mountain, but no luck yet.
Poorly. Very, very poorly.
@SecretHarpy
First Chinese Republic vs Qing Dynasty China
.
That book is a WILD ride.
These three cities made up the Aztec Empire.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: *series of quiet beeps and clicks*
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Good morning!
item.description:
Brought his person a spicy stick
"Let's take a relaxing vacation and get away from it all" they said. "It'll be fun!" they said.

item.title: in PJ vs in Cosplay - Ada Wong cosplay by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/p/DATvipzSzpe https://x.com/YuzuPyonCosplay/status/1838635621189058900 A little side by side of my Ada Wong cosplay transformation! Left side is no make up pj me, right is the final look. I recorded an Ada Wong make up tutorial video, should I post it ? For those curious, this awesome shirt is from Fakku. Men need love too! :) -yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA
item.description: I still won't give Sony my money, and I think that people shouldn't give Sony any money either, but this is funny as hell and I had to share. EDIT: That was a fast frontpage! Thanks everyone! Remember, screw Sony and all these AAAAA jerks! I do some reviews (As a hobby, not paid!) at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter
